summary: Clean, high‑fidelity recording praised despite minor blemishes; no specific musical highlights are mentioned.
review: Reviewers highlight the excellent sound quality – clean with good dynamic range – and note only a few imperfections in the tape. No concrete comments about the performance itself or individual songs were provided, leaving the musical aspect unaddressed.

ai_rating.rationale: Two reviewers gave high marks (5 and 4 stars) focusing on recording quality; a third gave a neutral 3‑star comment. With limited performance detail, the rating leans on the strong technical praise.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as clean, good fidelity, decent dynamic range; some blemishes noted but overall pleasant listening experience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure or performance quality were provided in the reviews.
